variant_targets.read: lemon peel 67, bright yellow sour face
watermelon slice 67, green rind and seed freckles
pink bubblegum 67, round bubble and sticker energy
sticker sheet 67, peel corner and glossy outline
party hat 67, confetti and birthday toy colors
arcade cabinet 67, neon buttons and pixel glow
royal crown 67, gold crown and playful badge
rocket 67, tiny fins and safe cartoon flame
rainbow 67, arced rainbow trail and shiny cheeks

runtime_composition.cards: existing slice9 card backgrounds plus generated character sprite and runtime lock/progress state
runtime_composition.board: existing frame/tile/highlight pieces; new characters remain separate sprites placed into slots
runtime_composition.characters: one transparent sprite per variant, same scale family as first 7, pivots near feet/body bottom
runtime_composition.fallback_until_integrated: native runtime may use procedural color fallback for variants 8-18, but release art must replace it

qa_rejects: character is not a variation of the 67 mascot

commands.slice_assets: extend tools/project_67_world/assets/build_67_world_art.py after source sheet is accepted
